Preparation

Learn what works & boost your score
guided by top NLU GRADS

closer to your dream NLU

Secure your spot now before it’s gone!

Here's what you'll learn

A clear roadmap to smarter CLAT preparation

3 Common Mistakes

We’ll walk you through the common mistakes most CLAT aspirants make, like studying without a clear plan or not analysing mocks properly, and show you how to avoid them from the start

Top Strategies

Complete Prep Schedule

CLAT 2027 Toolkit

Exclusive Free Resources for Your CLAT Journey

Free Mock Tests

Get access to practice tests that help you understand the exam pattern and see where you currently stand.

Monthly Current Affairs Compendiums

Stay updated with relevant current affairs in a simple, compiled format that’s easy to revise.

GK Question Bank

Practice important GK questions that are aligned with CLAT and help you build accuracy over time.

CLAT 2027 Strategy Blueprint

A well-structured CLAT strategy with clear, actionable steps. Focus on what matters and improve with the right direction.

What Our
Learners Say

Real feedback from students who
completed courses on 12 Minutes to CLAT

View Course

"I can’t thank 12 Minutes to CLAT enough!"

I’m incredibly grateful to Keshav Malpani sir and the 12 Minutes to CLAT team for helping me achieve AIR 16 and a seat at NLSIU. The live classes provided immense conceptual clarity, while the GK sessions were remarkably comprehensive yet concise. The offline mocks and detailed answer keys were instrumental in helping me identify and rectify my weaknesses effectively. Can’t thank the team enough for the guidance and support that made my law school dream a reality!

Astha Nayak

AIR 16 - NLSIU (CLAT 2024)
